title: Fix bot name detection — use whole-word matching
description:
From audit: ChatInterpreter uses message.Contains(botName, OrdinalIgnoreCase) which matches substrings. A bot named "Leo" triggers on "helios". Replace with compiled word-boundary regex (\\b{botName}\\b) for accurate mention detection.

Source: msa_audit_ad2215e-6-24-26.md (Finding 3, 92% confidence), memorysmith_agent_extended_audit (Finding 7, 92% confidence)
